blocks.content: Congratulations on completing this journey! Job well done!

We hope you've enjoyed traveling with us as you:

- Installed the Infinity data source and added it to your Grafana Cloud instance
- Configured basic authentication
- Selected a private data source connection
- Created a dashboard using CSV data

---

### More to explore (optional)

The world is your oyster! Read more about how to add other plugins and configure data sources:

- [Data source plugins for Grafana](https://grafana.com/grafana/plugins/data-source-plugins/)
- [Grafana data sources](/docs/grafana-cloud/connect-externally-hosted/data-sources/)
